user_story: US-06 — Como administrador, eu quero paginação no painel admin para que eu possa gerenciar grandes volumes de check-ins sem degradação da experiência.

non_conformances.requirement_detail: A lista deve exibir no máximo 10 check-ins por página.

requirements_verified.requirement: RF-009: Componente de paginação exibido quando há mais de uma página
requirements_verified.test_details: Component returns null when pages <= 1 at line 25

requirements_verified.requirement: RF-010: Página atual na URL como `page`
requirements_verified.test_details: Test at line 55: 'calls useCheckIns with status from URL params' verifies page=2 is parsed from URL and passed to useCheckIns

requirements_verified.requirement: RF-011: Navegar entre páginas preserva filtro de status
requirements_verified.test_details: Test at line 90-101: 'setPage updates page param and preserves status' verifies that calling setPage(2) with status=pending results in ?status=pending&page=2

features: Has prev/next buttons with data-testid attributes
Calls onChange callback on prev/next click
Parses page and status from URL search params
setPage preserves status when changing pages (RF-011 compliant)
setStatus resets page to 1 when filter changes
Uses useCheckInFilters to get status, page, setStatus, setPage
Passes page and status to useCheckIns hook
Calculates total pages using totalCheckInPages utility
Renders CheckInsPager with page, pages, onChange=setPage

summary: US-06 has 1 major non-conformance: RF-008 requires max 10 items per page but implementation uses 20. All other requirements (RF-009, RF-010, RF-011) are properly implemented and verified by existing tests.
